x-orbital-category.label: Vulkan
x-orbital-category.description: Vulkan loader, layers, and DXVK settings

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Loader Debug
x-orbital.description: Enable Vulkan Loader debug messages

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Device Select
x-orbital.description: Force a specific physical device to the top of the list (format: hex or decimal vendor_id:device_id, Linux only)

x-orbital.label: Disable Device Selection
x-orbital.description: Disable the loader's default device selection algorithm (Linux only)

x-orbital.label: Disable Instance Extension Filter
x-orbital.description: Disable filtering out instance extensions the loader does not support

x-orbital.label: Disable Dynamic Library Unloading
x-orbital.description: Keep dynamic libraries loaded after vkDestroyInstance (for leak sanitizer support)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Drivers Select
x-orbital.description: Select only drivers whose manifest file name matches the given glob patterns

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Drivers Disable
x-orbital.description: Disable drivers whose manifest file name matches the given glob patterns (checked before VK_LOADER_DRIVERS_SELECT)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Layers Enable
x-orbital.description: Select only layers whose name matches the given glob patterns

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Layers Disable
x-orbital.description: Disable layers whose name matches the given glob patterns (checked before VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Layers Allow
x-orbital.description: Prevent layers from being disabled by VK_LOADER_LAYERS_DISABLE

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Device ID Filter
x-orbital.description: Only list physical devices matching the given device ID filter (comma-separated decimal/hex values, use : for ranges)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Vendor ID Filter
x-orbital.description: Only list physical devices matching the given vendor ID filter (comma-separated decimal/hex values, use : for ranges)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Driver ID Filter
x-orbital.description: Only list physical devices matching the given driver ID filter (comma-separated decimal/hex values, use : for ranges)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Layer Path
x-orbital.description: Override the loader's default explicit layer search path (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Implicit Layer Path
x-orbital.description: Override the loader's default implicit layer search path (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Add Layer Path
x-orbital.description: Add additional paths for explicit layer search (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Add Implicit Layer Path
x-orbital.description: Add additional paths for implicit layer search (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Driver Files
x-orbital.description: Force the loader to use specific JSON driver manifest files (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Add Driver Files
x-orbital.description: Provide additional JSON driver manifest files for the loader to use (colon/semicolon separated)

x-orbital.label: Vulkan ICD Filenames
x-orbital.description: Force the loader to use specific ICD JSON files (DEPRECATED — use VK_DRIVER_FILES instead)
x-orbital.deprecationWarning: VK_ICD_FILENAMES is deprecated. Use VK_DRIVER_FILES instead.

x-orbital.label: Vulkan Instance Layers
x-orbital.description: Force the given layers into the Enabled layers list (DEPRECATED — semicolon separated)
x-orbital.deprecationWarning: VK_INSTANCE_LAYERS is deprecated. Use VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE instead.

x-orbital.label: DXVK HUD
x-orbital.description: Show DXVK HUD information (FPS, frametimes, etc.)

x-orbital.label: DXVK Log Level
x-orbital.description: DXVK logging verbosity

x-orbital.label: DXVK State Cache Path
x-orbital.description: Custom path for DXVK state cache

x-orbital.label: Enable FPS Limit
x-orbital.description: Enable framerate limiting in DXVK

x-orbital.label: Frame Rate Limit
x-orbital.description: Target framerate when DXVK_ENABLE_FRAMERATE_LIMIT is enabled
